title: Add deployment preflight checks
goal: Make the first staging and production deployment easier to verify before enabling automatic deploys.
scope: Add a VM-side preflight script for staging and production Compose environments.
Validate required commands, repository state, .env values, and Docker Compose configuration.
Run optional smoke checks when BASE_URL is provided.
Document preflight usage before the first GitHub Actions deployment.
verification: preflight.sh fails when the mode is missing or invalid.
preflight.sh validates environment files through validate-env.sh.
Documentation references the preflight step in deployment workflows.
completed_notes: Added deploy/compose/preflight.sh for VM-side launch readiness checks.
Documented preflight commands in Compose, CI/CD, and GCP deployment guides.
Registered TASK-021 in the task tracker.
